tEn: iBOT: Image BERT Pre-Training with Online Tokenizer
tZh: iBOT：基于在线分词器的图像BERT预训练
sEn: iBOT achieves masked image modeling with an online tokenizer via self-distillation, eliminating the need for pre-trained tokenizers and achieving state-of-the-art results on ImageNet-1K.
sZh: iBOT通过自蒸馏实现带在线分词器的掩码图像建模，无需预训练分词器，在ImageNet-1K上达到最优结果。
absEn: The success of language Transformers is primarily attributed to the pretext task of masked language modeling (MLM), where texts are first tokenized into semantically meaningful pieces. In this work, we study masked image modeling (MIM) and indicate the advantages and challenges of using a semantically meaningful visual tokenizer. We present a self-supervised framework iBOT that can perform masked prediction with an online tokenizer. Specifically, we perform self-distillation on masked patch tokens and take the teacher network as the online tokenizer, along with self-distillation on the class token to acquire visual semantics. The online tokenizer is jointly learnable with the MIM objective and dispenses with a multi-stage training pipeline where the tokenizer needs to be pre-trained beforehand. We show the prominence of iBOT by achieving an 82.3% linear probing accuracy and an 87.8% fine-tuning accuracy evaluated on ImageNet-1K. Beyond the state-of-the-art image classification results, we underline emerging local semantic patterns, which helps the models to obtain strong robustness against common corruptions and achieve leading results on dense downstream tasks, eg., object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation.
absZh: 语言Transformer的成功主要归功于掩码语言建模（MLM）这一预文本任务，其中文本首先被分词为语义上有意义的片段。在这项工作中，我们研究了掩码图像建模（MIM），并指出了使用语义上有意义的视觉分词器的优势和挑战。我们提出了一个自监督框架iBOT，它可以通过在线分词器执行掩码预测。具体来说，我们在掩码补丁令牌上执行自蒸馏，并将教师网络作为在线分词器，同时在类别令牌上进行自蒸馏以获取视觉语义。在线分词器与MIM目标联合学习，无需多阶段训练流程（即分词器需要预先训练）。我们通过在线性探测中达到82.3%的准确率，在ImageNet-1K微调中达到87.8%的准确率，展示了iBOT的优越性。除了最先进的图像分类结果外，我们强调了新兴的局部语义模式，这有助于模型获得对常见损坏的强鲁棒性，并在密集下游任务（如目标检测、实例分割和语义分割）上取得领先结果。

contrib.en: Proposes iBOT, a self-supervised framework for masked image modeling with an online tokenizer.
contrib.zh: 提出iBOT，一种使用在线分词器的自监督掩码图像建模框架。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art linear probing (82.3%) and fine-tuning (87.8%) accuracy on ImageNet-1K.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet-1K上达到82.3%线性探测和87.8%微调准确率，均为最优。

contrib.en: Eliminates multi-stage training by jointly learning the tokenizer and target model via self-distillation.
contrib.zh: 通过自蒸馏联合学习分词器和目标模型，消除了多阶段训练。

contrib.en: Discovers emerging part-level semantics in patch tokens, enhancing robustness and dense task performance.
contrib.zh: 发现补丁令牌中涌现的局部语义，增强了鲁棒性和密集任务性能。

contrib.en: Outperforms prior methods on object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation.
contrib.zh: 在目标检测、实例分割和语义分割上超越先前方法。

contrib.en: Demonstrates scalability to larger models and datasets, with consistent gains over DINO.
contrib.zh: 展示了向更大模型和数据集的扩展性，持续优于DINO。

limits.en: Requires more data to train larger models, as ViT-L/16 underperforms BEiT on 1K data.
limits.zh: 训练更大模型需要更多数据，ViT-L/16在1K数据上不如BEiT。

limits.en: Performance depends on the shared projection head design; separate heads yield worse results.
limits.zh: 性能依赖于共享投影头设计；分离头导致结果较差。

limits.en: Limited evaluation on datasets beyond ImageNet; transfer learning results may vary.
limits.zh: 对ImageNet以外数据集的评估有限；迁移学习结果可能不同。

limits.en: Online tokenizer may not capture semantics as effectively as offline tokenizers in some domains.
limits.zh: 在线分词器在某些领域可能不如离线分词器有效捕捉语义。

limits.en: Computational cost of self-distillation with momentum update may be high for very large models.
limits.zh: 动量更新的自蒸馏计算成本对超大模型可能较高。

items.en: The success of language Transformers is primarily attributed to the pretext task of masked language modeling (MLM) (Devlin et al., 2019), where texts are first tokenized into semantically meaningful pieces. In this work, we study masked image modeling (MIM) and indicate the advantages and challenges of using a semantically meaningful visual tokenizer. We present a self-supervised framework iBOT that can perform masked prediction with an online tokenizer. Specifically, we perform self-distillation on masked patch tokens and take the teacher network as the online tokenizer, along with self-distillation on the class token to acquire visual semantics. The online tokenizer is jointly learnable with the MIM objective and dispenses with a multi-stage training pipeline where the tokenizer needs to be pre-trained beforehand. We show the prominence of iBOT by achieving an 82.3% linear probing accuracy and an 87.8% fine-tuning accuracy evaluated on ImageNet-1K. Beyond the state-of-the-art image classification results, we underline emerging local semantic patterns, which helps the models to obtain strong robustness against common corruptions and achieve leading results on dense downstream tasks, e.g., object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/bytedance/ibot.
items.zh: 语言Transformer的成功主要归因于掩码语言建模（MLM）这一预文本任务（Devlin等人，2019），其中文本首先被分词为语义上有意义的片段。在本工作中，我们研究掩码图像建模（MIM），并指出使用语义上有意义的视觉分词器的优势和挑战。我们提出了一种自监督框架iBOT，它能够使用在线分词器执行掩码预测。具体来说，我们在掩码补丁令牌上执行自蒸馏，并将教师网络作为在线分词器，同时在类别令牌上执行自蒸馏以获取视觉语义。在线分词器与MIM目标联合学习，无需多阶段训练流程（即分词器需要预先训练）。我们通过在线性探测中达到82.3%的准确率、在ImageNet-1K上微调达到87.8%的准确率，展示了iBOT的优越性。除了最先进的图像分类结果外，我们强调了新兴的局部语义模式，这有助于模型获得对常见损坏的强鲁棒性，并在密集下游任务（如目标检测、实例分割和语义分割）中取得领先结果。代码和模型公开于https://github.com/bytedance/ibot。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Linear probing accuracy on ImageNet. We compare iBOT with other unsupervised baselines.
items.capZh: 图1：ImageNet上的线性探测准确率。我们将iBOT与其他无监督基线进行比较。

items.en: Masked Language Modeling (MLM), which first randomly masks and then reconstructs a set of input tokens, is a popular pre-training paradigm for language models. The MLM pre-trained Transformers (Devlin et al., 2019) have demonstrated their scalability to large-capacity models and datasets, becoming a de-facto standard for lingual tasks. However, its potential for Vision Transformer (ViT), which recently started to revolutionize computer vision research (Touvron et al., 2021; Dosovitskiy et al., 2021), has been largely underexplored. Most popular unsupervised pre-training schemes in vision deal with the global views (Chen et al., 2021; Caron et al., 2021), neglecting images’ internal structures, as opposed to MLM modeling local tokens. In this work, we seek to continue the success of MLM and explore Masked Image Modeling (MIM) for training better Vision Transformers such that it can serve as a standard component, as it does for NLP.
items.zh: 掩码语言建模（MLM）首先随机掩码然后重建一组输入令牌，是语言模型流行的预训练范式。MLM预训练的Transformer（Devlin等人，2019）已证明其可扩展到大规模模型和数据集，成为语言任务的事实标准。然而，其对视觉Transformer（ViT）的潜力——后者最近开始革新计算机视觉研究（Touvron等人，2021；Dosovitskiy等人，2021）——在很大程度上尚未被探索。视觉领域最流行的无监督预训练方案处理全局视图（Chen等人，2021；Caron等人，2021），忽略了图像的内部结构，这与MLM建模局部令牌相反。在本工作中，我们试图延续MLM的成功，探索掩码图像建模（MIM）以训练更好的视觉Transformer，使其能够像在NLP中一样成为标准组件。

items.en: One of the most crucial components in MLM is the lingual tokenizer which splits language into semantically meaningful tokens, e.g., WordPiece (Wu et al., 2016) in BERT. Similarly, the crux of MIM lies in a proper design of visual tokenizer, which transforms the masked patches to supervisory signals for the target model, as shown in Fig. 2. However, unlike lingual semantics arising naturally from the statistical analysis of word frequency (Sennrich et al., 2016), visual semantics cannot be extracted such easily due to the continuous property of images. Empirically, visual semantics emerges progressively by bootstrapping online representation that enforces a similarity of distorted image views (He et al., 2020; Grill et al., 2020; Caron et al., 2020). This property intuitively indicates a multi-stage training pipeline, where we need to first train an off-the-shelf semantic-rich tokenizer before training the target model. However, since acquiring visual semantics is a common end for both the tokenizer and target model, a single-stage training pipeline where the tokenizer and target model can be jointly optimized awaits further exploration.
items.zh: MLM中最关键的组件之一是语言分词器，它将语言分割为语义上有意义的令牌，例如BERT中的WordPiece（Wu等人，2016）。类似地，MIM的关键在于视觉分词器的适当设计，它将掩码补丁转换为目标模型的监督信号，如图2所示。然而，与语言语义（通过词频的统计分析自然产生，Sennrich等人，2016）不同，视觉语义由于图像的连续特性而难以如此提取。经验上，视觉语义通过引导在线表示（强制扭曲图像视图的相似性）逐步出现（He等人，2020；Grill等人，2020；Caron等人，2020）。这一特性直观地表明需要多阶段训练流程：在训练目标模型之前，需要先训练一个现成的语义丰富的分词器。然而，由于获取视觉语义是分词器和目标模型的共同目标，因此需要进一步探索单阶段训练流程，其中分词器和目标模型可以联合优化。

items.en: Previous works partially tackle the above challenges. Several works use identity mapping as the visual tokenizer, i.e., predicting the raw pixel values (Pathak et al., 2016; Atito et al., 2021). Such paradigm struggles in semantic abstraction and wastes the capacity at modeling high-frequency details, yielding less competitive performance in semantic understanding (Liu et al., 2021a). Recently, BEiT (Bao et al., 2021) proposes to use a pre-trained discrete VAE (Ramesh et al., 2021) as the tokenizer. Though providing some level of abstraction, the discrete VAE is still found only to capture low-level semantics within local details (as observed by Tab. 9). Moreover, the tokenizer needs to be offline pre-trained with fixed model architectures and extra dataset (Ramesh et al., 2021), which potentially limits its adapativity to perform MIM using data from different domains.
items.zh: 先前的工作部分解决了上述挑战。一些工作使用恒等映射作为视觉分词器，即预测原始像素值（Pathak等人，2016；Atito等人，2021）。这种范式在语义抽象方面存在困难，并浪费了建模高频细节的能力，导致语义理解性能较差（Liu等人，2021a）。最近，BEiT（Bao等人，2021）提出使用预训练的离散VAE（Ramesh等人，2021）作为分词器。尽管提供了一定程度的抽象，但离散VAE仍然只能捕获局部细节中的低级语义（如表9所示）。此外，分词器需要使用固定模型架构和额外数据集进行离线预训练（Ramesh等人，2021），这可能限制其适应不同领域数据执行MIM的能力。

items.capZh: 图2：掩码图像建模。I表示图像，Tok.表示视觉分词器。

items.en: To this end, we present iBOT , short for image BERT pre-training with Online Tokenizer, a new framework that performs MIM with a tokenizer handling above-mentioned challenges favorably. We motivate iBOT by formulating the MIM as knowledge distillation (KD), which learns to distill knowledge from the tokenizer, and further propose to perform self-distillation for MIM with the help of twin teacher as online tokenizer. The target network is fed with a masked image while the online tokenizer with the original image. The goal is to let the target network recover each masked patch token to its corresponding tokenizer output. Our online tokenizer naturally resolves two major challenges. On the one hand, our tokenizer captures high-level visual semantics progressively learned by enforcing the similarity of cross-view images on class tokens. On the other hand, our tokenizer needs no extra stages of training as pre-processing setup since it is jointly optimized with MIM via momentum update.
items.zh: 为此，我们提出iBOT（image BERT pre-training with Online Tokenizer的缩写），这是一个新框架，使用分词器执行MIM，并很好地处理了上述挑战。我们通过将MIM表述为知识蒸馏（KD）来激励iBOT，该蒸馏学习从分词器中提取知识，并进一步提出使用孪生教师作为在线分词器进行MIM的自蒸馏。目标网络输入掩码图像，而在线分词器输入原始图像。目标是让目标网络将每个掩码补丁令牌恢复为其对应的分词器输出。我们的在线分词器自然解决了两个主要挑战。一方面，我们的分词器通过强制类别令牌上的跨视图图像相似性逐步学习捕获高级视觉语义。另一方面，我们的分词器不需要额外的训练阶段作为预处理设置，因为它通过动量更新与MIM联合优化。

items.en: The online tokenizer enables iBOT to achieve excellent performance for feature representation. Specifically, iBOT advances ImageNet-1K classification benchmark under k𝑘k-NN, linear probing and fine-tuning protocols to 77.1%, 79.5%, 84.0% with ViT-Base/16 respectively, which is 1.0%, 1.3%, 0.4% higher than previous best results. When pre-trained with ImageNet-22K, iBOT with ViT-L/16 achieves a linear probing accuracy of 82.3% and a fine-tuning accuracy of 87.8%, which is 1.0% and 1.8% higher than previous best results. Beyond that, the advancement is also valid when transferring to other datasets or under semi-supervised and unsupervised classification settings. Of particular interest, we have identified an emerging part-level semantics that can help the model with image recognition both on global and local scales. We identify that the semantic patterns learned in patch tokens, which sufficiently lack in the off-line tokenizer as in BEiT (Bao et al., 2021), helps the model to be advanced in linear classification and robustness against common image corruptions. When it is transferred to downstream tasks, we show that in downstream tasks related to image classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation, iBOT surpasses previous methods with nontrivial margins. All of the evidence demonstrates that iBOT has largely closed the gap of masked modeling pre-training between language and vision Transformers.
items.zh: 在线分词器使iBOT在特征表示方面取得了优异性能。具体来说，iBOT在ImageNet-1K分类基准上，使用ViT-Base/16在k-NN、线性探测和微调协议下分别达到77.1%、79.5%和84.0%，比之前的最佳结果高出1.0%、1.3%和0.4%。当使用ImageNet-22K预训练时，iBOT with ViT-L/16在线性探测中达到82.3%的准确率，微调达到87.8%，比之前的最佳结果高出1.0%和1.8%。除此之外，在迁移到其他数据集或半监督和无监督分类设置下，这一进步同样有效。特别有趣的是，我们发现了新兴的部分级语义，这有助于模型在全局和局部尺度上进行图像识别。我们识别出补丁令牌中学习的语义模式（这在离线分词器中如BEiT（Bao等人，2021）中严重缺乏）有助于模型在线性分类和对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性方面取得进步。当迁移到下游任务时，我们表明在与图像分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割相关的下游任务中，iBOT以非平凡的优势超越了先前的方法。所有证据表明，iBOT在很大程度上缩小了语言和视觉Transformer之间掩码建模预训练的差距。

items.en: The teacher and the student share the same architecture consisting of a backbone f𝑓f (e.g., ViT) and a projection head h[CLS]superscriptℎ[CLS]h^{\texttt{[CLS]}}. The parameters of the student network 𝜽𝜽{\bm{\theta}} are Exponentially Moving Averaged (EMA) to the parameters of teacher network 𝜽′superscript𝜽bold-′{\bm{\theta^{\prime}}}. The loss is symmetrized by averaging with another cross-entropy term between 𝒗s[CLS]superscriptsubscript𝒗𝑠[CLS]{\bm{v}}_{s}^{\texttt{[CLS]}} and 𝒖t[CLS]superscriptsubscript𝒖𝑡[CLS]{\bm{u}}_{t}^{\texttt{[CLS]}}.
items.zh: 教师和学生共享相同的架构，包括主干f（例如ViT）和投影头h^[CLS]。学生网络参数θ通过指数移动平均（EMA）更新为教师网络参数θ'。损失通过平均另一个交叉熵项（v_s^[CLS]和u_t^[CLS]之间）进行对称化。

items.en: We motivate our method by identifying the similar formulation of Eq. (1) and Eq. (2). A visual tokenizer parameterized by online 𝜽′superscript𝜽bold-′{\bm{\theta^{\prime}}} instead of pre-fixed ϕbold-italic-ϕ{\bm{\phi}} thus arises naturally. In this section, we present iBOT, casting self-distillation as a token-generation self-supervised objective and perform MIM via self-distillation. We illustrate the framework of iBOT in Fig. 3 and demonstrate the pseudo-code in Appendix A. In Sec. 3.2, we briefly introduce the architecture and pre-training setup.
items.zh: 我们通过识别公式(1)和公式(2)的相似公式来激励我们的方法。因此，由在线θ'而不是预固定φ参数化的视觉分词器自然出现。在本节中，我们提出iBOT，将自蒸馏作为令牌生成的自监督目标，并通过自蒸馏执行MIM。我们在图3中说明iBOT的框架，并在附录A中展示伪代码。在第3.2节中，我们简要介绍架构和预训练设置。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overview of iBOT framework, performing masked image modeling with an online tokenizer. Given two views 𝒖𝒖{\bm{u}} and 𝒗𝒗{\bm{v}} of an image 𝒙𝒙{\bm{x}}, each view is passed through a teacher network ht∘ftsubscriptℎ𝑡subscript𝑓𝑡h_{t}\circ f_{t} and a student network hs∘fssubscriptℎ𝑠subscript𝑓𝑠h_{s}\circ f_{s}. iBOT minimizes two losses. The first loss ℒ[CLS]subscriptℒ[CLS]\mathcal{L}_{\texttt{[CLS]}} is self-distillation between cross-view [CLS] tokens. The second loss ℒMIMsubscriptℒMIM\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{MIM}} is self-distillation between in-view patch tokens, with some tokens masked and replaced by 𝒆[MASK]subscript𝒆[MASK]{\bm{e}}_{\texttt{[MASK]}} for the student network. The objective is to reconstruct the masked tokens with the teacher networks’ outputs as supervision.
items.capZh: 图3：iBOT框架概述，使用在线分词器执行掩码图像建模。给定图像x的两个视图u和v，每个视图通过教师网络h_t ∘ f_t和学生网络h_s ∘ f_s。iBOT最小化两个损失。第一个损失L_[CLS]是跨视图[CLS]令牌之间的自蒸馏。第二个损失L_MIM是视图内补丁令牌之间的自蒸馏，其中一些令牌被掩码并替换为e_[MASK]用于学生网络。目标是以教师网络的输出作为监督重建掩码令牌。

items.en: First, we perform blockwise masking (Bao et al., 2021) on the two augmented views 𝒖𝒖{\bm{u}} and 𝒗𝒗{\bm{v}} and obtain their masked views 𝒖^^𝒖\hat{\bm{u}} and 𝒗^^𝒗\hat{\bm{v}}. Taking 𝒖^^𝒖\hat{\bm{u}} as an example for simplicity, the student network outputs for the masked view 𝒖^^𝒖\hat{\bm{u}} projections of its patch tokens 𝒖^spatch=P𝜽patch​(𝒖^)superscriptsubscript^𝒖𝑠patchsuperscriptsubscript𝑃𝜽patch^𝒖\hat{\bm{u}}_{s}^{\mathrm{patch}}=P_{{\bm{\theta}}}^{\mathrm{patch}}(\hat{\bm{u}}) and the teacher network outputs for the non-masked view 𝒖𝒖{\bm{u}} projections of its patch tokens 𝒖tpatch=P𝜽′patch​(𝒖)superscriptsubscript𝒖𝑡patchsuperscriptsubscript𝑃superscript𝜽bold-′patch𝒖{\bm{u}}_{t}^{\mathrm{patch}}=P_{{\bm{\theta^{\prime}}}}^{\mathrm{patch}}({\bm{u}}). We here define the training objective of MIM in iBOT as
items.zh: 首先，我们对两个增强视图u和v执行块状掩码（Bao等人，2021），并获得它们的掩码视图û和v̂。以û为例简化，学生网络输出掩码视图û的补丁令牌投影û_s^patch = P_θ^patch(û)，教师网络输出非掩码视图u的补丁令牌投影u_t^patch = P_θ'^patch(u)。我们在此定义iBOT中MIM的训练目标为

items.en: We symmetrize the loss by averaging with another CE term between 𝒗^spatchsuperscriptsubscript^𝒗𝑠patch\hat{\bm{v}}_{s}^{\mathrm{patch}} and 𝒗tpatchsuperscriptsubscript𝒗𝑡patch{\bm{v}}_{t}^{\mathrm{patch}}.
items.zh: 我们通过平均另一个CE项（v̂_s^patch和v_t^patch之间）来对称化损失。

items.en: The backbone together with the projection head of teacher network htpatch∘ftsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡patchsubscript𝑓𝑡h_{t}^{\mathrm{patch}}\circ f_{t} is, therefore, a visual tokenizer that generates online token distributions for each masked patch token. The tokenizer used in iBOT is jointly learnable to MIM objective without a need of being pre-trained in an extra stage, a bonus feature of which is now its domain knowledge can be distilled from the current dataset rather than fixed to the specified dataset.
items.zh: 教师网络的骨干和投影头h_t^patch ∘ f_t因此是一个视觉分词器，为每个掩码补丁令牌生成在线令牌分布。iBOT中使用的分词器与MIM目标联合学习，无需在额外阶段预训练，其一个额外好处是现在其领域知识可以从当前数据集蒸馏，而不是固定到指定数据集。

items.en: To ensure that the online tokenizer is semantically-meaningful, we perform self-distillation on [CLS] token of cross-view images such that visual semantics can be obtained via bootstrapping, as achieved by the majority of the self-supervised methods (He et al., 2020; Grill et al., 2020; Caron et al., 2021). In practice, iBOT works with ℒ[CLS]subscriptℒ[CLS]\mathcal{L}_{\texttt{[CLS]}} in Eq. (2) proposed in DINO (Caron et al., 2021), except that now we have 𝒖^s[CLS]superscriptsubscript^𝒖𝑠[CLS]\hat{\bm{u}}_{s}^{\texttt{[CLS]}} instead of 𝒖s[CLS]superscriptsubscript𝒖𝑠[CLS]{\bm{u}}_{s}^{\texttt{[CLS]}} as input for the student network. To further borrow the capability of semantics abstraction acquired from self-distillatin on [CLS] token, we share the parameters of projection heads for [CLS] token and patch tokens, i.e., hs[CLS]=hspatchsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑠[CLS]superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑠patchh_{s}^{\texttt{[CLS]}}=h_{s}^{\mathrm{patch}}, ht[CLS]=htpatchsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡[CLS]superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡patchh_{t}^{\texttt{[CLS]}}=h_{t}^{\mathrm{patch}}. We empirically find that it produces better results than using separate heads.
items.zh: 为了确保在线分词器具有语义意义，我们在跨视图图像的[CLS]令牌上执行自蒸馏，以便通过引导获得视觉语义，正如大多数自监督方法所实现的那样（He等人，2020；Grill等人，2020；Caron等人，2021）。在实践中，iBOT使用DINO（Caron等人，2021）中提出的公式(2)中的L_[CLS]，不同之处在于现在学生网络的输入是û_s^[CLS]而不是u_s^[CLS]。为了进一步借用从[CLS]令牌自蒸馏获得的语义抽象能力，我们共享[CLS]令牌和补丁令牌的投影头参数，即h_s^[CLS] = h_s^patch，h_t^[CLS] = h_t^patch。我们经验发现这比使用单独的头产生更好的结果。

items.en: Unlike tokenized words whose semantics are almost certain, image patch is ambiguous in its semantic meaning. Therefore, tokenization as one-hot discretization can be sub-optimal for images. In iBOT, we use the token distribution after softmax instead of the one-hot token id as a supervisory signal, which plays an important role in iBOT pre-training as shown in Tab. 18.
items.zh: 与语义几乎确定的词令牌不同，图像补丁的语义是模糊的。因此，作为一热离散化的分词对于图像可能是次优的。在iBOT中，我们使用softmax后的令牌分布而不是一热令牌ID作为监督信号，这在iBOT预训练中起着重要作用，如表18所示。

items.en: We use the Vision Transformers (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021) and Swin Transformers (Liu et al., 2021b) with different amounts of parameters, ViT-S/16, ViT-B/16, ViT-L/16, and Swin-T/{7,14} as the backbone f𝑓f. For ViTs, /16 denotes the patch size being 161616. For Swins, /{7,14}absent714/\{7,14\} denotes the window size being 777 or 141414. We pre-train and fine-tune the Transformers with 224224224-size images, so the total number of patch tokens is 196196196. The projection head hℎh is a 333-layer MLPs with l2subscript𝑙2l_{2}-normalized bottleneck following DINO (Caron et al., 2021). Towards a better design to acquire visual semantics, we studied different sharing strategies between projection heads h[CLS]superscriptℎ[CLS]h^{\texttt{[CLS]}} and hpatchsuperscriptℎpatchh^{\mathrm{patch}}, considering that semantics obtained in distillation on [CLS] token helps the training of MIM on patch tokens. We empirically find that sharing the entire head prompts the best performance. We set the output dimension of the shared head to 819281928192.
items.zh: 我们使用视觉Transformer（Dosovitskiy等人，2021）和Swin Transformer（Liu等人，2021b）以及不同参数量的模型：ViT-S/16、ViT-B/16、ViT-L/16和Swin-T/{7,14}作为主干f。对于ViT，/16表示补丁大小为16。对于Swin，/{7,14}表示窗口大小为7或14。我们使用224×224大小的图像预训练和微调Transformer，因此补丁令牌总数为196。投影头h是一个3层MLP，带有l2归一化瓶颈，遵循DINO（Caron等人，2021）。为了更好设计以获取视觉语义，我们研究了投影头h^[CLS]和h^patch之间的不同共享策略，考虑到[CLS]令牌蒸馏中获得的语义有助于补丁令牌上的MIM训练。我们经验发现共享整个头能带来最佳性能。我们将共享头的输出维度设置为8192。

items.en: We by default pre-train iBOT on ImageNet-1K (Deng et al., 2009) training set with AdamW (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2019) optimizer and a batch size of 102410241024. We pre-train iBOT with ViT-S/16 for 800800800 epochs, ViT-B/16 for 400400400 epochs, ViT-L/16 for 250250250 epochs, and Swin-T/{7,14} for 300300300 epochs. We also pre-train on ImageNet-22K training set with ViT-B/16 for 808080 epochs and ViT-L/16 for 505050 epochs. The learning rate is linearly ramped up during the first 101010 epochs to its base value scaled with the total batch size: lr=5​e−4×batch​_​size/256lr5superscript𝑒4batch_size256\mathrm{lr}=5e^{-4}\times\mathrm{batch\_size}/256. We use random MIM, with prediction ratio r𝑟r set as 00 with a probability of 0.50.50.5 and uniformly sampled from range [0.10.10.1, 0.50.50.5] with a probability of 0.50.50.5. We sum ℒ[CLS]subscriptℒ[CLS]\mathcal{L}_{\texttt{[CLS]}} and ℒMIMsubscriptℒMIM\mathcal{L}_{\mathrm{MIM}} up without scaling.
items.zh: 我们默认在ImageNet-1K (Deng et al., 2009) 训练集上使用AdamW (Loshchilov & Hutter, 2019) 优化器和批大小1024预训练iBOT。我们使用ViT-S/16预训练800个epoch，ViT-B/16预训练400个epoch，ViT-L/16预训练250个epoch，Swin-T/{7,14}预训练300个epoch。我们还在ImageNet-22K训练集上使用ViT-B/16预训练80个epoch，ViT-L/16预训练50个epoch。学习率在前10个epoch线性增加到其基值，该基值按总批大小缩放：lr=5e-4×batch_size/256。我们使用随机MIM，预测比率r以0.5的概率设为0，以0.5的概率从[0.1, 0.5]范围内均匀采样。我们将ℒ[CLS]和ℒMIM直接相加，不做缩放。

items.en: We first transfer iBOT to downstream tasks, following the standard evaluation protocols adopted in prior arts, the details of which are delayed in Appendix C. We then study several interesting properties of Transformers pre-trained with iBOT. Finally, we give a brief ablation study on the crucial composing of iBOT.
items.zh: 我们首先将iBOT迁移到下游任务，遵循先前工作中采用的标准评估协议，具体细节见附录C。然后我们研究使用iBOT预训练的Transformer的几个有趣特性。最后，我们对iBOT的关键组成部分进行简要的消融研究。

items.en: We consider five classification protocols on ImageNet-1K: k𝑘k-NN, linear probing, fine-tuning, semi-supervised learning, and unsupervised learning.
items.zh: 我们在ImageNet-1K上考虑五种分类协议：k-NN、线性探测、微调、半监督学习和无监督学习。

items.en: To evaluate the quality of pre-trained features, we either use a k𝑘k-nearest neighbor (k𝑘k-NN) classifier or a linear classifier on the frozen representation. We follow the evaluation protocols in DINO (Caron et al., 2021). For k𝑘k-NN evaluation, we sweep over different numbers of nearest neighbors. For linear evaluation, we sweep over different learning rates. In Tab. 3, our method reaches a linear probing accuracy 77.9% with ViT-S/16, a linear probing accuracy 79.5% with ViT-B/16, and a k𝑘k-NN accuracy 78.0% and linear probing accuracy 81.0% with ViT-L/16, achieving state-of-the-art performance. With Swin-T/{7,14}, iBOT achieves a linear probing accuracy of 78.6% and 79.3% respectively.With ViT-L/16 and ImageNet-22K as pre-training data, iBOT further achieves a linear probing accuracy 82.3%, surpassing previous state of the art, 81.3% with Swin-B/14 by EsViT (Li et al., 2021a). A linear probing accuracy of 79.5% with ViT-B/16 is comparable to 79.8% by SimCLRv2 with RN152 (3×3\times)† but with 10×10\times less parameters. We underline that the performance gain over DINO gets larger (0.9% w/ ViT-S versus 1.3% w/ ViT-B) with more parameters, suggesting iBOT is more scalable to larger models.
items.zh: 为了评估预训练特征的质量，我们在冻结表示上使用k近邻（k-NN）分类器或线性分类器。我们遵循DINO (Caron et al., 2021)中的评估协议。对于k-NN评估，我们遍历不同的近邻数量。对于线性评估，我们遍历不同的学习率。在表3中，我们的方法在ViT-S/16上达到77.9%的线性探测准确率，在ViT-B/16上达到79.5%的线性探测准确率，在ViT-L/16上达到78.0%的k-NN准确率和81.0%的线性探测准确率，实现了最先进的性能。使用Swin-T/{7,14}，iBOT分别达到78.6%和79.3%的线性探测准确率。使用ViT-L/16和ImageNet-22K作为预训练数据，iBOT进一步达到82.3%的线性探测准确率，超越了之前的最先进水平，即EsViT (Li et al., 2021a)使用Swin-B/14的81.3%。ViT-B/16上79.5%的线性探测准确率与SimCLRv2使用RN152 (3×)的79.8%相当，但参数少了10倍。我们强调，与DINO相比，性能提升随着参数增多而增大（ViT-S上0.9%对比ViT-B上1.3%），表明iBOT在更大模型上更具可扩展性。

items.en: We study the fine-tuning on ImageNet-1K and focus on the comparison with self-supervised methods for Transformers and its supervised baseline (Rand.) (Touvron et al., 2021). As shown in Tab. 3, iBOT achieves an 82.3%, 84.0%, and 84.8% top-1 accuracy with ViT-S/16, ViT-B/16, and ViT-L/16, respectively. As shown in Tab. 3, iBOT pre-trained with ImageNet-22K achieves 84.4% and 86.6% top-1 accuracy with ViT-B/16 and ViT-L/16, respectively, outperforming ImageNet-22K pre-trained BEiT by 0.7% and 0.6%. When fine-tuned on an image size of 512, we achieve 87.8% accuracy. We note that, with ViT-L/16, iBOT is 0.4% worse than BEiT using 1K data but 0.6% better using 22K data. This implies that iBOT requires more data to train larger model.
items.zh: 我们研究在ImageNet-1K上的微调，并重点与Transformer的自监督方法及其监督基线(Rand.) (Touvron et al., 2021)进行比较。如表3所示，iBOT在ViT-S/16、ViT-B/16和ViT-L/16上分别达到82.3%、84.0%和84.8%的top-1准确率。如表3所示，使用ImageNet-22K预训练的iBOT在ViT-B/16和ViT-L/16上分别达到84.4%和86.6%的top-1准确率，分别比ImageNet-22K预训练的BEiT高出0.7%和0.6%。当在512图像尺寸上微调时，我们达到87.8%的准确率。我们注意到，使用ViT-L/16时，iBOT在使用1K数据时比BEiT差0.4%，但使用22K数据时好0.6%。这表明iBOT需要更多数据来训练更大的模型。

items.en: For semi-supervised learning, we focus our comparison with methods following the unsupervised pre-train, supervised fine-tune paradigm. As shown in Tab. 5, iBOT advances DINO by 1.6% and 0.8% using 1% and 10% data, respectively, suggesting a higher label efficiency. For unsupervised learning, we use standard evaluation metrics, including accuracy (ACC), adjusted random index (ARI), normalized mutual information (NMI), and Fowlkes-Mallows index (FMI). We compare our methods to SimCLRv2 (Chen et al., 2020b), Self-label (Asano et al., 2020), InfoMin (Tian et al., 2020), and SCAN (Van Gansbeke et al., 2020). As shown in Tab. 5, we achieve a 32.8% NMI, outperforming the previous state of the art by 1.8%, suggesting MIM helps the model learn stronger visual semantics on a global scale.
items.zh: 对于半监督学习，我们重点与遵循无监督预训练、监督微调范式的方法进行比较。如表5所示，iBOT在使用1%和10%数据时分别比DINO提升1.6%和0.8%，表明更高的标签效率。对于无监督学习，我们使用标准评估指标，包括准确率（ACC）、调整兰德指数（ARI）、归一化互信息（NMI）和Fowlkes-Mallows指数（FMI）。我们将我们的方法与SimCLRv2 (Chen et al., 2020b)、Self-label (Asano et al., 2020)、InfoMin (Tian et al., 2020)和SCAN (Van Gansbeke et al., 2020)进行比较。如表5所示，我们达到32.8%的NMI，比之前的最先进水平高出1.8%，表明MIM帮助模型在全局尺度上学习更强的视觉语义。

items.en: Object detection and instance segmentation require simultaneous object location and classification.We consider Cascade Mask R-CNN (Cai & Vasconcelos, 2019; He et al., 2017) that produces bounding boxes and instance masks simultaneously on COCO dataset (Lin et al., 2014). Several recent works (Liu et al., 2021b; Wang et al., 2021a) proposes Vision Transformers that suit dense downstream tasks. To compare, we include the results of supervised Swin-T (Liu et al., 2021b) which shares approximate parameter numbers with ViT-S/16 and its self-supervised counterpart MoBY (Xie et al., 2021a) in Tab. 6. iBOT improves ViT-S’s APb from 46.2 to 49.4 and APm from 40.1 to 42.6, surpassing both supervised Swin-T and its self-supervised counterpart by a nontrivial margin. With ViT-B/16, iBOT achieves an APb of 51.2 and an APm of 44.2, surpassing previous best results by a large margin.
items.zh: 目标检测和实例分割需要同时进行目标定位和分类。我们考虑在COCO数据集 (Lin et al., 2014)上同时生成边界框和实例掩码的Cascade Mask R-CNN (Cai & Vasconcelos, 2019; He et al., 2017)。最近的一些工作 (Liu et al., 2021b; Wang et al., 2021a)提出了适合密集下游任务的Vision Transformer。为了比较，我们在表6中包含了监督Swin-T (Liu et al., 2021b)的结果，其参数数量与ViT-S/16大致相同，以及其自监督对应方法MoBY (Xie et al., 2021a)。iBOT将ViT-S的APb从46.2提升到49.4，APm从40.1提升到42.6，以显著的优势超越了监督Swin-T及其自监督对应方法。使用ViT-B/16，iBOT达到51.2的APb和44.2的APm，以较大优势超越了之前的最佳结果。

items.en: Semantic segmentation can be seen as a pixel-level classification problem. We mainly consider two segmentation settings on ADE20K dataset (Zhou et al., 2017). First, similar to linear evaluation protocol in classification, we evaluate on the fixed patch features and only fine-tune a linear layer, which gives us a more explicit comparison of the quality of representations. Second, we use the task layer in UPerNet (Xiao et al., 2018) and fine-tune the entire network. From Tab. 6, we can see that iBOT advances its supervised baseline with ViT-S/16 with a large margin of 0.9 on mIoU, surpassing Swin-T. With ViT-B/16, iBOT advances previous best methods DINO by 3.2 on mIoU with UperNet. We notice a performance drop of BEiT using linear head, indicating BEiT’s features lack local semantics. As analyzed later, the property of strong local semantics induces a 2.9 mIoU gain compared to the supervised baseline with a linear head.
items.zh: 语义分割可以看作是一个像素级分类问题。我们主要考虑ADE20K数据集 (Zhou et al., 2017)上的两种分割设置。首先，类似于分类中的线性评估协议，我们在固定的块特征上进行评估，仅微调一个线性层，这使我们能够更明确地比较表示的质量。其次，我们使用UPerNet (Xiao et al., 2018)中的任务层并微调整个网络。从表6中，我们可以看到iBOT在ViT-S/16上以mIoU 0.9的大幅优势超越了其监督基线，超过了Swin-T。使用ViT-B/16，iBOT在使用UperNet时以mIoU 3.2的优势超越了之前的最佳方法DINO。我们注意到BEiT在使用线性头时性能下降，表明BEiT的特征缺乏局部语义。正如后面分析的，强局部语义的特性使得与使用线性头的监督基线相比，mIoU提升了2.9。

items.en: We study transfer learning where we pre-train on ImageNet-1K and fine-tune on several smaller datasets.We follow the training recipe and protocol used in (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021). The results are demonstrated in Tab. 7. While the results on several datasets (e.g., CIFAR10, CIFAR100, Flowers, and Cars) have almost plateaued, iBOT consistently performs favorably against other SSL frameworks, achieving state-of-the-art transfer results. We observe greater performance gain over DINO in larger datasets like iNaturalist18 and iNaturalist19, indicating the results are still far from saturation. We also find that with larger models, we typically get larger performance gain compared with DINO (e.g., 1.7% with ViT/S-16 versus 2.0% with ViT-B/16 on iNaturalist18, and 0.3% with ViT/S-16 versus 1.0% with ViT-B/16 on iNaturalist19).
items.zh: 我们研究迁移学习，其中我们在ImageNet-1K上预训练并在几个较小的数据集上微调。我们遵循 (Dosovitskiy et al., 2021)中使用的训练配方和协议。结果如表7所示。虽然在几个数据集（例如CIFAR10、CIFAR100、Flowers和Cars）上的结果几乎已经饱和，但iBOT始终优于其他SSL框架，实现了最先进的迁移结果。我们在更大的数据集（如iNaturalist18和iNaturalist19）上观察到比DINO更大的性能提升，表明结果远未饱和。我们还发现，与DINO相比，使用更大的模型通常会获得更大的性能提升（例如，在iNaturalist18上，ViT/S-16为1.7%对比ViT-B/16为2.0%；在iNaturalist19上，ViT/S-16为0.3%对比ViT-B/16为1.0%）。

full.sec: 4.3 Properties of ViT trained with MIM

items.en: In the previous sections, we have shown the priority of iBOT on various tasks and datasets. To reveal the strengths of iBOT pre-trained Vision Transformers, we analyze its property from several aspects.
items.zh: 在前面的章节中，我们已经展示了iBOT在各种任务和数据集上的优势。为了揭示iBOT预训练Vision Transformer的优势，我们从几个方面分析其特性。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Pattern layout of patch tokens. Two left figures showcase patterns, headlight of the vehicle and ear of the dog, that share part semantics. Two right figures showcase patterns, stripped and curly surface, that share part textures.
items.capZh: 图4：块标记的模式布局。左侧两图展示了共享部分语义的模式，即车辆的前灯和狗的耳朵。右侧两图展示了共享部分纹理的模式，即条纹表面和卷曲表面。

items.en: The output from the projection head used for self-distillation depicts for patch token a probabilistic distribution. To help understand what patterns MIM induces to learn, we visualize several pattern layouts. We use 800800800-epoch pre-trained ViT-S/16 and visualize the top-363636 patches with the highest confidence on ImageNet-1K validation set. We visualize a 5×5\times context for each 16×16161616\times 16 patch (colored orange). We observe the emergence of both high-level semantics and low-level details. As shown in Fig. 4, several patches are grouped with clear semantic meaning, e.g., headlight and dog’s ear. Such behavior stands a distinct contrast with the offline tokenizer used in BEiT (Bao et al., 2021), which encapsulates mostly low-level details as shown in Fig. 16. Apart from patch patterns that share high-level semantics, we also observe clusters accounting for low-level textures, indicating the diversity of learned part patterns. The comparison with previous work (Caron et al., 2021; Bao et al., 2021) and the visualization of more pattern layouts are provided in Appendix G.1.
items.zh: 用于自蒸馏的投影头输出为块标记提供了概率分布。为了帮助理解MIM诱导学习到的模式，我们可视化了几个模式布局。我们使用800个epoch预训练的ViT-S/16，并在ImageNet-1K验证集上可视化置信度最高的前36个块。我们为每个16×16块（橙色标记）可视化5×上下文。我们观察到高层语义和低层细节的出现。如图4所示，几个块被分组为清晰的语义含义，例如前灯和狗的耳朵。这种行为与BEiT (Bao et al., 2021)中使用的离线分词器形成鲜明对比，后者主要封装低层细节，如图16所示。除了共享高层语义的块模式外，我们还观察到负责低层纹理的聚类，表明学习到的部分模式的多样性。与先前工作 (Caron et al., 2021; Bao et al., 2021)的比较以及更多模式布局的可视化见附录G.1。

items.en: To illustrate how the property of better part semantics can help image recognition, we use part-wise linear classification to study the relationship between representations of patch tokens and [CLS] token. Specifically, we average k𝑘k patch tokens with the top-k𝑘k highest self-attention scores. The results are demonstrated in Fig. 6. While the performance gap between DINO and iBOT is only 0.9% in the standard setting (77.9% v.s. 77.0%) with [CLS]delimited-[]CLS[\texttt{CLS}] token, we observe that iBOT outperforms DINO when using the patch representations directly. We observe that using top-565656 patch tokens yields an optimal result, and iBOT is 5.9% higher than DINO. The performance gap becomes more prominent when using fewer patch tokens. When using only the patch token with the highest self-attention score, iBOT advances by 17.9%. These results reveal much semantic information in iBOT representations for patch tokens, which helps the model to be more robust to the loss of local details and further boosts its performance on image-level recognition.
items.zh: 为了说明更好的部分语义特性如何帮助图像识别，我们使用部分线性分类来研究块标记表示与[CLS]标记之间的关系。具体来说，我们平均具有最高自注意力分数的前k个块标记。结果如图6所示。虽然在标准设置中使用[CLS]标记时，DINO和iBOT之间的性能差距仅为0.9%（77.9%对比77.0%），但我们观察到直接使用块表示时iBOT优于DINO。我们观察到使用前56个块标记得到最优结果，iBOT比DINO高5.9%。当使用更少的块标记时，性能差距变得更加显著。当仅使用具有最高自注意力分数的块标记时，iBOT提升了17.9%。这些结果揭示了iBOT表示中块标记包含大量语义信息，这有助于模型对局部细节丢失更加鲁棒，并进一步提升其在图像级识别上的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Part-wise linear probing accuracy. Top-k𝑘k tokens with the highest attention scores are averaged for classification.
items.capZh: 图5：部分线性探测准确率。将具有最高注意力分数的前k个标记平均用于分类。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visualization for self-attention map. Self-attention map from multiple heads are visualized with different color.
items.capZh: 图6：自注意力图的可视化。来自多个头的自注意力图用不同颜色可视化。

items.en: To analyze, we visualize the self-attention map with ViT-S/16. We choose [CLS] token as the query and visualize attention maps from different heads of the last layer with different colors, as shown in Fig. 6. Of particular interest, we indicate that iBOT shows a solid ability to separate different objects or different parts of one object apart. For example, in the leftmost figure, we observe iBOT fairly distinct the bird from the tree branch. Also, iBOT focuses mainly on the discriminative parts of the object (e.g., the wheel of the car, the beak of the bird). These properties are crucial for iBOT to excel at image recognition, especially in complicated scenarios with object occlusion or distracting instances. While these properties are not unique strengths brought by MIM and we observe similar behaviors in DINO, we show in Appendix G.2 that iBOT generally gives better visualized results.
items.zh: 为了分析，我们使用ViT-S/16可视化自注意力图。我们选择[CLS]标记作为查询，并用不同颜色可视化最后一层不同头的注意力图，如图6所示。特别值得注意的是，我们指出iBOT显示出将不同对象或一个对象的不同部分分开的可靠能力。例如，在最左边的图中，我们观察到iBOT相当清晰地将鸟与树枝区分开。此外，iBOT主要关注对象的判别性部分（例如，汽车的车轮、鸟的喙）。这些特性对于iBOT在图像识别中表现出色至关重要，尤其是在对象遮挡或干扰实例的复杂场景中。虽然这些特性并非MIM带来的独特优势，我们在DINO中也观察到类似行为，但我们在附录G.2中展示了iBOT通常给出更好的可视化结果。

items.en: The above-mentioned properties brought by MIM objective can improve the model’s robustness to uncommon examples. We quantitatively benchmark robustness in terms of 333 aspects: background change, occlusion, and out-of-distribution examples, with a ViT-S/16 pre-trained for 800800800 epochs and then linearly evaluated for 100100100 epochs. Results are shown in Tab. 8. For background change, we study images under 777 types of change, detailed in Appendix D. iBOT is more robust against background changes except for O.BT.. For occlusion, we study the linear accuracy with salient and non-salient patch dropping following Naseer et al. (2021) with an information loss ratio of 0.50.50.5. iBOT has a smaller performance drop under both settings. For out-of-distribution examples, we study natural adversarial examples in ImageNet-A (Hendrycks et al., 2021) and image corruptions in ImageNet-C (Hendrycks & Dietterich, 2019). iBOT has higher accuracy on the ImageNet-A and a smaller mean corruptions error (mCE) on the ImageNet-C.
items.zh: 上述由MIM目标带来的特性可以提高模型对不常见示例的鲁棒性。我们从三个方面定量评估鲁棒性：背景变化、遮挡和分布外示例，使用预训练800个epoch然后线性评估100个epoch的ViT-S/16。结果如表8所示。对于背景变化，我们研究7种变化类型下的图像，详见附录D。iBOT对背景变化更鲁棒，除了O.BT.。对于遮挡，我们按照Naseer et al. (2021)的方法，在信息损失比率为0.5的情况下，研究显著和非显著块丢弃下的线性准确率。iBOT在两种设置下性能下降更小。对于分布外示例，我们研究ImageNet-A (Hendrycks et al., 2021)中的自然对抗样本和ImageNet-C (Hendrycks & Dietterich, 2019)中的图像损坏。iBOT在ImageNet-A上具有更高的准确率，在ImageNet-C上具有更小的平均损坏误差（mCE）。

items.en: In this section, we ablate the importance of using a semantically meaningful tokenizer using a 300300300-epoch pre-trained ViT-S/16 with a prediction ratio r=0.3𝑟0.3r=0.3 and without multi-crop augmentation. Additional ablations are given in Appendix E. iBOT works with self-distillation on [CLS] token with cross-view images (ℒ[CLS]subscriptℒ[CLS]\mathcal{L}_{\texttt{[CLS]}}) to acquire visual semantics. To verify, we conduct experiments to perform MIM without ℒ[CLS]subscriptℒ[CLS]\mathcal{L}_{\texttt{[CLS]}} or with alternative models as visual tokenizer. Specifically, ∘\circ denotes a standalone DINO and △△\triangle denotes a pre-tranined DALL-E encoder (Ramesh et al., 2021).
items.zh: 在本节中，我们消融了使用语义上有意义的分词器的重要性，使用预训练300个epoch、预测比率r=0.3且无多裁剪增强的ViT-S/16。额外的消融见附录E。iBOT通过对跨视图图像的[CLS]标记进行自蒸馏（ℒ[CLS]）来获取视觉语义。为了验证，我们进行了在没有ℒ[CLS]或使用替代模型作为视觉分词器的情况下进行MIM的实验。具体来说，∘表示独立的DINO，△表示预训练的DALL-E编码器 (Ramesh et al., 2021)。

items.en: We find that performing MIM without ℒ[CLS]subscriptℒ[CLS]\mathcal{L}_{\texttt{[CLS]}} leads to undesirable results of 9.5% k𝑘k-NN accuracy and 29.8% linear accuracy, indicating that visual semantics can hardly be obtained with only MIM. While semantics emerges with a standalone DINO as a visual tokenizer, it is still far from reaching a decent result (44.3% versus 69.1% in k𝑘k-NN accuracy). Comparing iBOT with multi-tasking of DINO and BEiT (DINO+BEiT), we see the strengths of merging the semantics acquired by self-distillation with the visual tokenizer with an 11.5% advance in linear probing and 0.3% in fine-tuning. Moreover, we empirically observe a performance improvement using a Shared projection Head (SH) for [CLS] token and patch tokens, which shares the semantics acquired in [CLS] token to MIM.
items.zh: 我们发现，在没有ℒ[CLS]的情况下进行MIM会导致不理想的结果：k-NN准确率9.5%，线性准确率29.8%，表明仅使用MIM很难获得视觉语义。虽然使用独立的DINO作为视觉分词器时语义出现，但仍远未达到理想结果（k-NN准确率44.3%对比69.1%）。将iBOT与DINO和BEiT的多任务学习（DINO+BEiT）进行比较，我们看到将自蒸馏获得的语义与视觉分词器结合的优势：线性探测提升11.5%，微调提升0.3%。此外，我们经验性地观察到，对[CLS]标记和块标记使用共享投影头（SH）可以提升性能，这将在[CLS]标记中获得的语义共享给MIM。

items.en: Most self-supervised methods assume an augmentation invariance of images and achieve so by enforcing similarity over distorted views of one image while avoiding model collapse. Avoiding collapse can be achieved by noise-contrastive estimation with negative samples (Wu et al., 2018; He et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2020a), introducing asymmetric network (Grill et al., 2020; Chen & He, 2021), or explicitly enforcing the distribution of image distribution over the channel to be uniform as well as one-hot (Caron et al., 2020; Amrani & Bronstein, 2021; Caron et al., 2021). In fact, the idea of simultaneously enforcing distribution uniform and one-hot is hidden from earlier studies performing representation learning via clustering (Caron et al., 2018; 2020; YM. et al., 2020), where the cluster assignment naturally meets these two requirements. Other methods rely on handcrafted pretext tasks and assume the image representation should instead be aware of image augmentation by solving image jigsaw puzzle (Noroozi & Favaro, 2016; Wei et al., 2019), predicting rotation (Komodakis & Gidaris, 2018) or relative position (Doersch et al., 2015).

Predicting masked images parts is a popular self-supervised pretext task drawing on the idea of auto-encoding and has been previously achieved by either recovering raw pixels (Pathak et al., 2016; Atito et al., 2021; Li et al., 2021b) or mask contrastive learning (Henaff, 2020; Zhao et al., 2021). Recently, it is formulated into MIM (Bao et al., 2021; Tan et al., 2021) with a discrete VAE (Rolfe, 2017; Ramesh et al., 2021) as visual tokenizer. As a counterpart of MLM in NLP, MIM eases masked prediction into a classification problem supervised by labels output from the tokenizer, mitigating the problem of excessive focus on high-frequency details. Concurrently, masked image prediction has been explored in the field of multi-modality, i.e., vision-language representation learning. These methods operate on local regions instead of global images thus reply on pre-trained detection models, i.e., Faster-RCNN (Ren et al., 2015) to propose regions of interest. (Su et al., 2020; Lu et al., 2019; Chen et al., 2020c) perform masked region classification tasking the category distribution output from the detection model as the ground-truth.
items.zh: 预测被掩码的图像部分是流行的自监督预训练任务，借鉴了自编码的思想，之前通过恢复原始像素（Pathak 等人，2016；Atito 等人，2021；Li 等人，2021b）或掩码对比学习（Henaff，2020；Zhao 等人，2021）实现。最近，它被形式化为 MIM（Bao 等人，2021；Tan 等人，2021），使用离散 VAE（Rolfe，2017；Ramesh 等人，2021）作为视觉分词器。作为 NLP 中 MLM 的对应，MIM 将掩码预测简化为一个分类问题，由分词器输出的标签监督，缓解了过度关注高频细节的问题。同时，掩码图像预测已在多模态领域（即视觉-语言表示学习）中得到探索。这些方法作用于局部区域而非全局图像，因此依赖预训练的检测模型（如 Faster-RCNN（Ren 等人，2015））来提议感兴趣区域。（Su 等人，2020；Lu 等人，2019；Chen 等人，2020c）执行掩码区域分类，将检测模型输出的类别分布作为真实标签。

items.en: In this work, we study BERT-like pre-training for Vision Transformers and underline the significance of a semantically meaningful visual tokenizer. We present a self-supervised framework iBOT that performs masked image modeling via self-distillation with an online tokenizer, achieving state-of-the-art results on downstream tasks related to classification, object detection, instance segmentation, and semantic segmentation. Of particular interest, we identify an emerging part-level semantics for models trained with MIM that helps for not only recognition accuracy but also robustness against common image corruptions. In the future, we plan to scale up iBOT to a larger dataset (e.g., ImageNet-22K) or larger model size (e.g., ViT-L/16 and ViT-H/16) and investigate whether MIM can help Vision Transformers more scalable to unlabelled data in the wild.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了 Vision Transformer 的类 BERT 预训练，并强调了语义上有意义的视觉分词器的重要性。我们提出了一个自监督框架 iBOT，通过在线分词器的自蒸馏进行掩码图像建模，在下游任务（如分类、目标检测、实例分割和语义分割）上取得了最先进的结果。特别有趣的是，我们发现了 MIM 训练模型出现的部分级语义，这不仅有助于识别准确性，还能增强对常见图像损坏的鲁棒性。未来，我们计划将 iBOT 扩展到更大的数据集（例如 ImageNet-22K）或更大的模型规模（例如 ViT-L/16 和 ViT-H/16），并研究 MIM 是否能使 Vision Transformer 更好地扩展到野外的无标签数据。
